00027 #ifndef JELATINE_CLASS_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_CLASS_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "classfile.h"
00033 #include "constantpool.h"
00034 #include "field.h"
00035 #include "header.h"
00036 #include "method.h"
00037 #include "memory.h"
00038 #include "thread.h"
00039 
00040 #include "java_lang_Class.h"
00041 
00042 // Forward declarations
00043 
00044 struct class_t;
00045 
00046 /******************************************************************************
00047  * Interface manager type definitions                                         *
00048  ******************************************************************************/
00049 
00052 struct interface_manager_t {
00053     struct class_t **interfaces; 
00054     uint32_t entries; 
00055 };
00056 
00058 typedef struct interface_manager_t interface_manager_t;
00059 
00060 /******************************************************************************
00061  * Interface manager interface                                                *
00062  ******************************************************************************/
00063 
00064 extern interface_manager_t *im_create( void );
00065 extern void im_add(interface_manager_t *, struct class_t *);
00066 extern void im_flatten(interface_manager_t *);
00067 extern bool im_is_present(interface_manager_t *, struct class_t *);
00068 
00069 /******************************************************************************
00070  * Interface iterator                                                         *
00071  ******************************************************************************/
00072 
00075 struct interface_iterator_t {
00076     struct class_t **interfaces; 
00077     size_t entries; 
00078     size_t index; 
00079 };
00080 
00082 typedef struct interface_iterator_t interface_iterator_t;
00083 
00088 static inline interface_iterator_t interface_itr(interface_manager_t *im)
00089 {
00090     interface_iterator_t itr;
00091 
00092     itr.interfaces = im->interfaces;
00093     itr.entries = im->entries;
00094     itr.index = 0;
00095 
00096     return itr;
00097 } // interface_itr()
00098 
00103 static inline bool interface_itr_has_next(interface_iterator_t itr)
00104 {
00105     return itr.index < itr.entries;
00106 } // interface_itr_has_next()
00107 
00113 static inline struct class_t *interface_itr_get_next(interface_iterator_t *itr)
00114 {
00115     assert(interface_itr_has_next(*itr));
00116 
00117     return itr->interfaces[itr->index++];
00118 } // interface_itr_get_next()
00119 
00120 /******************************************************************************
00121  * Class type definition                                                      *
00122  ******************************************************************************/
00123 
00126 enum class_state_t {
00127     CS_DUMMY = 0, 
00128     CS_PRELOADED = 1, 
00129     CS_LINKING = 2, 
00130     CS_LINKED = 3, 
00131     CS_INITIALIZING = 4, 
00132     CS_INITIALIZED = 5, 
00133     CS_ERRONEOUS = 6 
00134 };
00135 
00137 typedef enum class_state_t class_state_t;
00138 
00141 struct class_t {
00142     char *name; 
00143     uintptr_t obj; 
00144     struct class_t *parent; 
00145     const_pool_t *const_pool; 
00146     uint16_t access_flags; 
00147     uint16_t state; 
00148     uint16_t id; 
00149 
00150     // Array related data
00151     uint8_t elem_type; 
00152     uint8_t dimensions; 
00153     struct class_t *elem_class; 
00154 
00155     // Fields used in the initialization process
00156     thread_t *init_thread; 
00157 
00158     // Field related data
00159     uint32_t ref_n; 
00160     uint32_t nref_size; 
00161     uint32_t fields_n; 
00162     field_t *fields; 
00163     static_field_t *static_data; 
00164 
00165     // Method related data
00166     method_manager_t *method_manager; 
00167     interface_manager_t *interface_manager; 
00168     uint32_t itable_count; 
00169     uint32_t dtable_count; 
00170     method_t **dtable; 
00171     uint16_t *inames; 
00172     method_t **itable; 
00173 };
00174 
00176 typedef struct class_t class_t;
00177 
00178 /******************************************************************************
00179  * Class interface                                                            *
00180  ******************************************************************************/
00181 
00182 extern bool class_is_parent(const class_t *, const class_t *);
00183 extern void class_add_field(class_t *, const field_info_t *,
00184                             const field_attributes_t *);
00185 extern field_t *class_get_field(const class_t *, const char *, const char *,
00186                                 bool);
00187 extern void class_purge_initializer(class_t *);
00188 
00189 /******************************************************************************
00190  * Class inlined functions                                                    *
00191  ******************************************************************************/
00192 
00197 static inline uint32_t class_get_ref_n(const class_t *cl)
00198 {
00199     return cl->ref_n;
00200 } // class_get_ref_n()
00201 
00207 static inline uint32_t class_get_nref_size(const class_t *cl)
00208 {
00209     return cl->nref_size;
00210 } // class_get_nref_size()
00211 
00216 static inline class_t *class_get_parent(const class_t *cl)
00217 {
00218     return cl->parent;
00219 } // class_get_parent()
00220 
00225 static inline uint32_t class_get_id(const class_t *cl)
00226 {
00227     return cl->id;
00228 } // class_get_id()
00229 
00234 static inline bool class_is_object(const class_t *cl)
00235 {
00236     return cl->parent == NULL; // Only Object doesn't have a parent class
00237 } // class_is_object()
00238 
00243 static inline bool class_is_array(const class_t *cl)
00244 {
00245     return cl->access_flags & ACC_ARRAY;
00246 } // class_is_array()
00247 
00252 static inline uint8_t class_get_dimensions(const class_t *cl)
00253 {
00254     assert(class_is_array(cl));
00255     return cl->dimensions;
00256 } // class_get_dimensions()
00257 
00262 static inline bool class_is_interface(const class_t *cl)
00263 {
00264     return cl->access_flags & ACC_INTERFACE;
00265 } // class_is_interface()
00266 
00271 static inline bool class_is_abstract(const class_t *cl)
00272 {
00273     return cl->access_flags & ACC_ABSTRACT;
00274 } // class_is_abstract()
00275 
00280 static inline bool class_is_final(const class_t *cl)
00281 {
00282     return cl->access_flags & ACC_FINAL;
00283 } // class_is_final()
00284 
00289 static inline bool class_is_public(const class_t *cl)
00290 {
00291     return cl->access_flags & ACC_PUBLIC;
00292 } // class_is_public()
00293 
00298 static inline bool class_is_super(const class_t *cl)
00299 {
00300     return cl->access_flags & ACC_SUPER;
00301 } // class_is_super()
00302 
00303 #if JEL_FINALIZER
00304 
00309 static inline bool class_has_finalizer(const class_t *cl)
00310 {
00311     return cl->access_flags & ACC_HAS_FINALIZER;
00312 } // class_has_finalizer()
00313 
00314 #endif // JEL_FINALIZER
00315 
00320 static inline void class_set_state(class_t *cl, class_state_t state)
00321 {
00322     assert(cl->state < state); // Class state can only 'increase'
00323     cl->state = state;
00324 } // class_set_state()
00325 
00330 static inline bool class_is_preloaded(const class_t *cl)
00331 {
00332     return cl->state == CS_PRELOADED;
00333 } // class_is_preloaded()
00334 
00339 static inline bool class_is_being_linked(const class_t *cl)
00340 {
00341     return cl->state == CS_LINKING;
00342 } // class_is_being_linked()
00343 
00348 static inline bool class_is_linked(const class_t *cl)
00349 {
00350     return cl->state == CS_LINKED;
00351 } // class_is_linked()
00352 
00357 static inline bool class_is_being_initialized(const class_t *cl)
00358 {
00359     return cl->state == CS_INITIALIZING;
00360 } // class_is_being_initialized()
00361 
00366 static inline bool class_is_initialized(const class_t *cl)
00367 {
00368     return cl->state == CS_INITIALIZED;
00369 } // class_is_initialized()
00370 
00376 static inline uintptr_t class_get_object(const class_t *cl)
00377 {
00378     return cl->obj;
00379 } // class_get_object()
00380 
00385 static inline void class_alloc_fields(class_t *cl, size_t count)
00386 {
00387     assert((cl->fields_n == 0) && (cl->fields == NULL));
00388 
00389     cl->fields = gc_palloc(sizeof(field_t) * count);
00390 } // class_alloc_fields()
00391 
00392 #endif // !JELATINE_CLASS_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:44 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
